roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOT TO REDUCE PURS PC17(B) - FILED AT INSISTENCE
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: PTD ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X: PER PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROJECT REPORT DATED 03-01-18, THE DEFENDANT HASCOMPLETED THE REQUIRED 35 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE AT SALVATION ARMY AND THE ASSIGNED PROGRAM,/TEXT: COURT GRTS MOTIONTO DISM PURS PC 1001,7 AS TO COUNTS  1, 2, 3, 4, 5, & 6/1001,7: 1, 2, 3,4, 5, & 6/BE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, MOTION TO SUPPRESS, MOTION TO REDUCE PURS, 17B/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE 17B MOTION AS TO ALL COUNTS/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT(S) 1, CHARGING 459PC & COUNT 2, CHARGING 475(C)PC ARE REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/PTDIV:03-01-18/X:DEFENDANTORDERED TO COMPLETE 35 HRS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE/CONTD:ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOPU:PTD/X:COUNT(S) 3, 4, 5, & 6 TRAILING SUCCESSFUL DIVERSION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 1-26-18/987,2/X:BAIL REMAINS THE SAME AT 70000/SA2:1ST REPUBLIC AT 405 HOWARD ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:CALENDARED IN ERROR, CONTINUED TO CORRECT DATE: 12-27-17 FOR PREHEARING CONFERENCE, AND PRELIM HRG ON 12-07-17 IS VACATED/
